Description / Acceptance Criteria: User authenticates via Sleep Number SSO (SAML). Redirect to IdP, handle callback, establish session, store user profile.
Dependencies: Azure AD / Identity Provider access, SAML metadata
Risks / Assumptions: Risk: SSO configuration delays from IT. Assumption: SAML metadata available.

Description / Acceptance Criteria: Maintain authenticated session, handle token refresh, logout functionality, session timeout handling.
Display personalized welcome message with professional + motivational tone. Show user's first name from SSO profile.
Risks / Assumptions: Assumption: User profile includes display name

Description / Acceptance Criteria: Display: Total sessions completed, Average session duration, Last session date. Pull from session history data.
Risks / Assumptions: Risk: Performance if many sessions. Assumption: Stats calculated server-side.

Description / Acceptance Criteria: CTA button to navigate to Persona Selection screen. Prominent placement, clear labeling.
Overall home page layout, responsive design, navigation structure.
Radio/card selection for: Director, Realter, Socializer, Thinker, Random. Visual representation of each persona.
Radio/card selection for: Skeptical, Budget Conscious, Luxury Seeker, Random. Can combine with DISC selection.
Start session with selected personas. Validate selection made, initiate session creation in backend.
Risks / Assumptions: Risk: Need clear error handling if no selection made

Description / Acceptance Criteria: When Random selected, system randomly assigns persona(s). Store actual persona for later reveal in evaluation.
Display realistic AI avatar with integrated voice. Avatar should match persona characteristics. Different avatars and voices for different personas. Includes lip sync and voice output.
Risks / Assumptions: Risk: Avatar licensing/costs. Risk: Avatar realism quality. Risk: Voice latency.

Description / Acceptance Criteria: Process user input, generate contextual AI responses based on persona behavior prompt. Maintain conversation context.
Risks / Assumptions: Risk: Response quality/relevance. Assumption: Using Claude via Azure AI Foundry.

Description / Acceptance Criteria: Visual countdown timer showing remaining session time. Warning at low time (e.g., 2 min remaining).
Risks / Assumptions: Assumption: Timer visible but not intrusive

Description / Acceptance Criteria: Ability to pause the session and resume. Pause should stop timer and mute interaction.
Risks / Assumptions: Risk: State management complexity when paused

Description / Acceptance Criteria: Button to end session before 15 min or trigger phrase. Confirm before ending.
Mute microphone, adjust AI voice volume. Visual indicators for mute state.
Detect when user says 'Let's get your SleepNumber setting' or variations. End session gracefully.
Auto-end at 15 minutes with 'Moving to next phase' screen. Graceful transition to evaluation.
Record/store session audio or transcript for replay functionality. Secure storage.
Risks / Assumptions: Risk: Storage costs. Risk: Privacy/compliance considerations.

Description / Acceptance Criteria: Display list/cards of last 10 sessions on home page. Sorted by most recent.
Risks / Assumptions: Assumption: Paginated if more than 10 total

Description / Acceptance Criteria: Each card shows: Date/Time, Persona used (DISC + Marketing), Duration, AI summary snippet.
Click on session card to view full summary, feedback, and access replay.
Risks / Assumptions: Risk: Data retrieval performance for old sessions

Description / Acceptance Criteria: Form with conditional questions. Clean, easy-to-use interface. Submit and Cancel buttons.
If Random was selected: 'What DISC persona did you interact with?' - Multiple choice (Director/Realter/Socializer/Thinker).
Two open-text questions: 'What was the toughest part?' and 'What could you have done better?'
Store self-evaluation responses linked to session. Handle submit and cancel actions.
Show how long the user was in the session (actual time, not max 15 min).
Generate qualitative feedback based on Connect & Discover criteria using evaluation prompt.
Risks / Assumptions: Risk: Feedback quality/relevance. Assumption: AI analyzes transcript.

Description / Acceptance Criteria: Display specific strengths identified from the session. Bullet points or cards.
Display areas for improvement identified from session. Constructive, actionable feedback.
Button/link to replay the session audio/video. Audio player or video playback.
Risks / Assumptions: Risk: Playback performance. Assumption: Audio-only replay acceptable.

Description / Acceptance Criteria: Navigate back to home page after reviewing results.
Create comprehensive prompt defining how AI should behave based on DISC + Marketing persona combination. Include personality traits, objection styles, response patterns.
Risks / Assumptions: Risk: Prompt tuning iterations needed. Assumption: 16 combinations (4 DISC x 4 Marketing incl. variations).

Description / Acceptance Criteria: Create prompt for AI to evaluate completed session. Define Connect & Discover criteria, how to identify strengths, how to suggest improvements.
Risks / Assumptions: Risk: Evaluation accuracy. Assumption: Criteria provided by Sleep Number.

Description / Acceptance Criteria: Test prompts with various scenarios, iterate based on output quality. Fine-tune for consistency.
Provision and configure Azure App Service for web application hosting.
Provision database (Cosmos DB or Azure SQL) for users, sessions, evaluations.
Configure Azure AI Foundry for Claude API access. Set up endpoints, authentication.
Risks / Assumptions: Risk: API quota/limits. Assumption: Claude available via Azure.

Description / Acceptance Criteria: Set up automated build, test, deploy pipeline. GitHub Actions or Azure DevOps.
Configure dev, staging, production environments. Environment variables, secrets management.
Set up application monitoring, error tracking, performance metrics. Azure Monitor or similar.
Build real-time analytics dashboard accessible to admins only. Responsive layout with charts and metrics cards.
Risks / Assumptions: Risk: Role-based access control setup. Assumption: Admin role defined in SSO.

Description / Acceptance Criteria: Restrict analytics dashboard to admin users only. Role-based access via SSO claims or database flag.
Risks / Assumptions: Risk: Admin role identification from SSO. Assumption: Admin users identifiable.

Description / Acceptance Criteria: Track and display total registered users and active users (used in last 30 days).
Track total sessions started, total sessions completed, calculate completion rate percentage.
Calculate and display average session duration across all completed sessions.
Chart showing session distribution by DISC persona type (Director/Realter/Socializer/Thinker/Random).
Chart showing session distribution by Marketing persona (Skeptical/Budget Conscious/Luxury Seeker/Random).
Heatmap or matrix showing which DISC + Marketing combinations are most frequently selected.
Risks / Assumptions: Assumption: Visual heatmap or table format

Description / Acceptance Criteria: Track and display percentage of sessions where self-evaluation was submitted vs skipped.
Track repeat users and show improvement trends over multiple sessions. Identify users improving over time.
Risks / Assumptions: Risk: Defining 'improvement' metric. Assumption: Based on AI feedback scores/keywords.

Description / Acceptance Criteria: Dashboard updates in real-time or near real-time (websockets or polling). Live session counter.
Risks / Assumptions: Risk: Performance with many concurrent users. Assumption: Polling acceptable if websockets complex.

Description / Acceptance Criteria: Allow admins to filter analytics by date range (today, last 7 days, last 30 days, custom range).
Export analytics data to CSV or PDF for reporting purposes.
